arts.ttl: Hansi Flick has good news for Gavi ahead of Barca’s run-in
arts.sum: Barcelona midfielder Gavi seems to have lost prominence in recent weeks after making a successful comeback from a serious knee injury. The Barcelona boss and his staff had previously designed a plan for Gavi and did not expect him to feel 100% again after his return until the end of March.

arts.ttl: The squad for Barça v Osasuna
arts.sum: The rescheduled fixture appeared to come too soon for some players, however, which was the case for both Ronald Araujo and Raphinha, with coach Hansi Flick previously stating that they wouldn't be in the squad after the long trip back from South America so close to the game. It's also worth noting that Iñigo Martínez has been passed fit and included, and that young centre back Alexis Olmedo has been named in a first team squad for the first time.
